name: Rand Paul
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $201,753 for Rand Paul in U.S. Senate, KY. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
